stories.name: row-based-contact-picker
stories.title: Row-based contact picker
stories.description: Replace the native <Select>/<option> contact picker in InviteMemberModal with a scrollable VStack of avatar+name rows (reusing ProfileSummary), preserving selection state, disabled-row semantics (already-member/blocked reason suffixes), the guidance/empty-state fallback, and the existing submit/loading/error/success flow exactly. Enlarge ModalContent and cap the row-list height with overflowY="auto" so long contact lists scroll internally. Update data-testid selectors to invite-contact-list / invite-contact-row-${pubkeyHex}, and update every e2e spec/helper that drove the old <select> via Playwright's selectOption() to instead click the corresponding row.

includes: Replace the FormControl/Select/<option> block in InviteMemberModal.tsx with row components, one per entries item, using ProfileSummary for avatar+name
Add data-testid="invite-contact-list" container and data-testid="invite-contact-row-${pubkeyHex}" per row
Preserve selectedPubkeyHex/isSelectionValid/hasSelectable selection-state model unchanged; only the rendering of entries changes
Render disabled (already-member/blocked) rows non-clickable with existing copy.groups.inviteReasonAlreadyMember / inviteReasonBlocked reason text
Add visible selected-state affordance (e.g. aria-pressed + border/background) on the selected row
Enlarge ModalContent (size="lg" or explicit maxW) and cap invite-contact-list height with overflowY="auto" so the row list scrolls internally
Keep rows as plain clickable Box/Flex elements (not LinkBox/LinkOverlay) so clicking never navigates the browser
Preserve the guidance-state fallback (data-testid="invite-guidance-state") when hasSelectable is false, and ensure invite-contact-list is absent in that case
Update app/tests/e2e/helpers/group-setup.ts's invite-contact-select/selectOption() interaction to wait for and click invite-contact-row-${inviteeHex} instead

Update app/tests/e2e/groups-invite-pending-contact-selectable.spec.ts, app/tests/e2e/groups-invite-guidance-state.spec.ts, and app/tests/e2e/groups-error-cases.spec.ts to drive the picker via the new row testid, preserving each spec's original assertion outcome
excludes: Any change to selectableContactsForGroup, submitInvite, resolveInviteTarget, or inviteByNpub
Any change to which contacts are invitable, or to guidance-state copy/link
New i18n keys — all copy already exists under copy.groups.*

stories.notes: Single-story epic per architecture.md (no new module boundaries, no seams). All target files (InviteMemberModal.tsx, group-setup.ts, and the three e2e specs) pre-exist on disk — this is a markup/selector rewrite, not new-file scaffolding. lighter_path intentionally omitted (defaults false): the story edits production UI markup with behavioral implications for keyboard/click interaction (disabled-row click-through logic, selection affordance), so it routes through the full integration-architect pass rather than the lead-direct-edit lighter path.

dependency_notes: Single story, no dependencies. S1 is fully self-contained: it touches exactly one production component (InviteMemberModal.tsx) plus its direct e2e coverage (group-setup.ts helper and three e2e specs), with no cross-story seams per architecture.md.
